title: Karnataka HC grants interim relief to lawyers whose bank accounts were frozen on former client's complaint
description: The Karnataka High Court recently granted an interim relief to two practising advocates whose bank accounts were frozen on the basis of an allegedly vague cyber complaint filed by a disgruntled former client [Channekeshava DR v State of Karnataka & Ors].In a common order passed on two connected petitions filed by the two lawyers, who are husband and wife, Justice Sachin Shankar Magadum noted that their accounts were frozen without any crime being registered."The said action is taken despite
